name: Sumstone
tagline: The classic numbers puzzle - pick your tiles, reach the target, beat the clock.
description: Six numbers. One goal. Endless combinations. A calm, satisfying math puzzle inspired by the Countdown numbers round. No internet needed, no accounts, no pressure.

features.title: Timed Rounds
features.description: Race against the clock to find the solution. Multiple time limits for different difficulty levels.

features.title: Multiple Difficulties
features.description: From easy warm-ups to brain-bending challenges. Find your perfect level.

features.title: Offline Play
features.description: No internet required. Play anywhere, anytime - on the subway, in a waiting room, on a plane.

features.title: No Ads, No Accounts
features.description: Just the puzzle. No sign-ups, no interruptions, no tracking. Pure focus.

faqs.question: Is Sumstone free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sumstone is completely free to download and play. There are no in-app purchases or subscriptions.

faqs.question: Does Sumstone work offline?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Sumstone requires no internet connection. Once downloaded, you can play anywhere without Wi-Fi or data.

faqs.question: What is the Countdown numbers game?
faqs.answer: The Countdown numbers game is a classic British TV puzzle where contestants use six numbers and basic arithmetic (+, -, ×, ÷) to reach a target number. Sumstone is inspired by this format.

faqs.question: Is Sumstone available on Android?
faqs.answer: Currently Sumstone is available on iOS. Android support is planned for a future update.

faqs.question: Do I need to be good at math to play?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Sumstone is about logical thinking and exploration. The easier levels are accessible to everyone, while harder levels challenge math enthusiasts.
